brandInventoryCollected.command: rg --json --ignore-case -o \bAgentField\b|\bagentfield\b|AGENTFIELD|Agent-Field|agentfield\.ai|AgentPlane|agentplane|Agent Plane|agent plane README.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md SUPPORT.md SECURITY.md CLAUDE.md .github docs specs examples deployments skills control-plane/README.md control-plane/scripts/README.md control-plane/tools/perf/README.md control-plane/migrations/README.md control-plane/internal/templates control-plane/internal/skillkit/skill_data/agentfield control-plane/web/client sdk tests --glob !**/node_modules/** --glob !**/dist/** --glob !**/.pytest_cache/**

editableBrandSurfaces: example READMEs, UI copy, and visible benchmark labels
deployment READMEs, chart descriptions, and NOTES output
skills/agentfield source prose and embedded mirror prose
admin UI labels, navigation, empty states, and About copy
SDK README and package metadata descriptions
changeSetBoundaryVerified.notes: No runtime route, storage schema, SDK API, package name, module path, image name, Helm chart name, env var, YAML config path, or skill slug rename is planned.
protectedRuntimeAreas: storage schema and JSON field names
Docker image names and Kubernetes resource names
Helm chart names and helper names
env vars and YAML config paths
skill slugs and embedded skill paths
web UI storage keys and API path identifiers
